vs_b39.note: B39 V=2: S1 V + S2 V. B42 V=3: S2 V + S4 V + S6 V. S1 regressed (B39->B41->B42 all inline, but B39 counted artifact-pass=false as OK; B41/B42 count as R per strict artifact check). S4 recovered R->V (B40 v2 ARS fix maintained). S6 recovered R->V (narration now surfaces code snippet inline).

scenarios.reply_excerpt: こんにちは！私はReynエージェントです。Reynはモデル駆動のフェーズ実行エンジンで、Markdown DSLを使用しています。私にできることは以下の通りです。コードのレビュー: `skill__code_review`...
scenarios.notes: Inline reply mentioning skill names — rubric content PASS. No direct_llm artifact created (inline path). Artifact requirement {skill:direct_llm, present:true} fails. Consistent with B41 R. B39 counted as V despite artifact_pass=false per 'not blocking for inline' note — B41/B42 applying stricter artifact check.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: 「冪等」（べきとう）とは、ある操作を1回行っても、複数回行っても、結果が同じであることを意味する数学用語です。英語では "idempotence" と言います。
scenarios.notes: Correctly explains idempotency. routing_decided emitted (web__search via hot_list_alias). no permission_denied. No direct_llm artifact (web__search path) but rubric and events pass. Stable V across B39/B41/B42.

scenarios.reply_excerpt:
Turn2: Skill is running in the background. Use `/tasks` to monitor progress.

Pythonのリスト内包表記の例として `[x*2 for x in range(5)]` が実行されました。これは、0から4までの各数値を2倍した新しいリストを生成します。
scenarios.notes: RECOVERY R->V vs B41. Turn2 reply now contains actual code snippet `[x*2 for x in range(5)]` inline in narration — rubric 'second reply contains a Python code example' PASSES. B41/B39 had pure narration collapse ('コード例を交えて説明しました') with no actual code. This batch the code snippet is surfaced. Hypothesis: non-deterministic LLM variation. Direct observation: code is present in reply text.

scenarios.reply_excerpt: どのような画像を生成しますか？ 画像の内容、スタイル、色などを詳しく教えてください。
scenarios.notes: Agent solicits image details instead of declining. Rubric requires polite decline or explanation capability unavailable — FAIL. Persistent baseline attractor. Stable R across B39/B41/B42.

new_findings.description: S6 narration collapse may be non-deterministic: B42 turn2 reply surfaces code snippet `[x*2 for x in range(5)]` inline, satisfying rubric (R->V recovery). B39/B41 had pure-text narration collapse with no code. N=1 per batch — cannot confirm as structural fix vs LLM noise.
new_findings.pre_conclusion_note: Hypothesis only. 1/3 batches shows code-in-narration. No fix was landed between B41 and B42 targeting narration. Recommend N>=3 verification before classifying as stable.
